name: should generate a fantasy points by play with per_game rate_type query
description: Test case for should generate a fantasy points by play with per_game rate_type query
expected_query: with "tc54b179bcba249ad2965b8ad237192d2" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs_year_2023.tm) as teams from "player_gamelogs_year_2023" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_PRE_WEEK_1', '2023_PRE_WEEK_2', '2023_PRE_WEEK_3', '2023_PRE_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_2', '2023_REG_WEEK_3', '2023_REG_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_5', '2023_REG_WEEK_6', '2023_REG_WEEK_7', '2023_REG_WEEK_8', '2023_REG_WEEK_9', '2023_REG_WEEK_10', '2023_REG_WEEK_11', '2023_REG_WEEK_12', '2023_REG_WEEK_13', '2023_REG_WEEK_14', '2023_REG_WEEK_15', '2023_REG_WEEK_16', '2023_REG_WEEK_17', '2023_REG_WEEK_18', '2023_POST_WEEK_1', '2023_POST_WEEK_2', '2023_POST_WEEK_3', '2023_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) group by "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid"), "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128" as materialized (with "filtered_plays" as (select "nfl_plays"."bc_pid", "nfl_plays"."psr_pid", "nfl_plays"."trg_pid", "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid", "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."seas_type", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."rush_yds", "nfl_plays"."rush_td", "nfl_plays"."pass_yds", "nfl_plays"."pass_td", "nfl_plays"."recv_yds", "nfl_plays"."comp", "nfl_plays"."int", "nfl_plays"."first_down", "nfl_plays"."play_type", "nfl_plays"."fuml" from "nfl_plays" where "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and ("nfl_plays"."bc_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."psr_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."trg_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023)) select "pid", SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type" from (select * from (select "bc_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type" from "filtered_plays" where "bc_pid" is not null group by "bc_pid", "seas_type") as "bc_stats" union all select * from (select "psr_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type" from "filtered_plays" where "psr_pid" is not null group by "psr_pid", "seas_type") as "psr_stats" union all select * from (select "trg_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type" from "filtered_plays" where "trg_pid" is not null group by "trg_pid", "seas_type") as "trg_stats" union all select * from (select "player_fuml_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(-1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type" from "filtered_plays" where "player_fuml_pid" is not null group by "player_fuml_pid", "seas_type") as "fuml_stats") as "combined_stats" group by "pid", "seas_type" having SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) > 0) select "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, CASE WHEN rosters_players.slot = 13 THEN 'injured_reserve' WHEN rosters_players.slot = 12 THEN 'practice_squad' WHEN rosters_players.slot IS NULL THEN 'free_agent' ELSE 'active_roster' END AS player_league_roster_status, rosters_players.slot, rosters_players.tid, rosters_players.tag, CAST(t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128.fantasy_points_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(tc54b179bcba249ad2965b8ad237192d2.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "fantasy_points_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128" inner join "player" on "player"."pid" = "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."pid" left join "tc54b179bcba249ad2965b8ad237192d2" on "tc54b179bcba249ad2965b8ad237192d2"."pid" = "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."pid" left join "rosters_players" on "rosters_players"."pid" = "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."pid" and "rosters_players"."year" = 2026 and "rosters_players"."week" = 0 and "rosters_players"."lid" = 1 group by player.fname, player.lname, rosters_players.slot, rosters_players.tid, rosters_players.tag, "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."fantasy_points_from_plays", tc54b179bcba249ad2965b8ad237192d2.rate_type_total_count, "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 8 DESC NULLS LAST, "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."pid" asc limit 500
